name: @nko/superpowers
description: OpenClaw superpowers - AI-powered workflows for development, testing, and product decisions

scripts.package: npm run build && npm run package:skills
scripts.package:skills: mkdir -p dist-skills && cd dist && tar -czf ../dist-skills/browse.skill.tar.gz browse/ && tar -czf ../dist-skills/qa.skill.tar.gz qa/ && tar -czf ../dist-skills/ship.skill.tar.gz ship/ && tar -czf ../dist-skills/plan-ceo-review.skill.tar.gz plan-ceo-review/

author: nKO
